Popular films Visit our YouTube channel
Monster Monster Beware of the most vicious monster… The Vacuum Cleaner! Simon's Cat and Kitten join forces to defeat their enemy in our Halloween Special 'The Monster Returns
TV Dinner Simon's Cat tries to gain his owner's attention.
Let me in A hungry cat wants in...or not...
Double trouble A new arrival causes chaos.
The box A curious cat investigates an empty cardboard box.
Cat man do A hungry cat resorts to increasingly desperate measures to wake its sleeping owner.
Hot water A hungry cat gets his owner into some hot water.
Fly guy A funny cat resorts to increasingly desperate measures to catch a housefly.
